parameters.query: SELECT item_name, category, price, is_available, is_vegetarian, is_spicy FROM restaurant_menu WHERE business_account_id = '{{ $json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' ORDER BY category, item_name;

UPDATE restaurant_menu SET is_available = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE business_account_id = '{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' AND LOWER(item_name) = LOWER('{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.itemName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}') RETURNING item_name, is_available;

INSERT INTO restaurant_menu (business_account_id, category, item_name, price, is_available) VALUES ('{{ $json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}', '{{ $json.category.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.itemName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.price }}, true) ON CONFLICT (business_account_id, item_name) DO UPDATE SET price = EXCLUDED.price, category = EXCLUDED.category, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING item_name, category, price;

parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: { reply: '🛠️ *Admin Commands:*
  `stock` — view all stock levels
  `addstock <item name>` — mark item as available
  `additem <category> <name> <price>` — add new menu item' } }];

parameters.query: SELECT s.date, s.customer_name, s.total, si.item_name, si.quantity, si.price FROM sales s JOIN sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.id ORDER BY s.date DESC LIMIT 25;

SELECT item_name, category, price, is_available, description FROM restaurant_menu WHERE business_account_id = '{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' AND LOWER(item_name) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.itemName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}%') LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { reply: '🏪 *Franchise Commands:*\n  `sales` — last 5 sales\n  `stock <item name>` — check item availability' } }];

parameters.query: SELECT item_name, category, price, is_vegetarian, is_spicy, description FROM restaurant_menu WHERE business_account_id = '{{ $json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' AND is_available = true ORDER BY category, item_name;

SELECT id, item_name, price FROM restaurant_menu WHERE business_account_id = '{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' AND is_available = true AND LOWER(item_name) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.itemName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}%') LIMIT 1;

parameters.body:
={
  "amount": {{ $json.totalPaise }},
  "currency": "INR",
  "accept_partial": false,
  "description": "Mercanta order: {{ $json.qty }}x {{ $json.itemName }}",
  "customer": { "contact": "+{{ $json.sender }}" },
  "notify": { "whatsapp": false, "sms": false, "email": false },
  "reminder_enable": false,
  "notes": { "item_name": "{{ $json.itemName }}", "qty": {{ $json.qty }}, "sender": "{{ $json.sender }}", "business_account_id": "{{ $json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}" },
  "callback_url": "https://mercanta.app/pay/success",
  "callback_method": "get"
}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sales (customer_name, total, payment_method, payment_details, business_account_id) VALUES ('WhatsApp Customer', {{ $('Customer: Build Order').item.json.total }}, 'upi', '{"razorpay_payment_link_id": "{{ $json.id }}", "status": "pending"}', '{{ $('Customer: Build Order').item.json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}') RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO sale_items (sale_id, item_name, quantity, price) VALUES ('{{ $('Save Pending Sale').item.json.id }}', '{{ $('Customer: Build Order').item.json.itemName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $('Customer: Build Order').item.json.qty }}, {{ $('Customer: Build Order').item.json.price }});

SELECT s.date, s.total, s.payment_details, si.item_name, si.quantity, si.price FROM sales s JOIN sale_items si ON si.sale_id = s.id WHERE s.business_account_id = '{{ $('Parse & Classify').item.json.BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID }}' ORDER BY s.date DESC LIMIT 5;

parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: { reply: '👋 Welcome to *Mercanta*!

Send a command:
  `menu` — view available items
  `buy <item name>` — purchase an item
  `buy <item name> <qty>` — buy multiple
  `receipt` — view your last order' } }];

_setup_notes.step_1_postgres: The Postgres credential 'Postgres account' (id: 35LH1zuTLUd1CCzS) is reused from your personal bot. No action needed.
_setup_notes.step_2_razorpay: Create an HTTP Basic Auth credential in n8n named 'Razorpay API'. Username = Razorpay Key ID, Password = Razorpay Key Secret. Then replace the id 'RAZORPAY-CRED-ID' in the Razorpay node with the real credential id.
_setup_notes.step_3_business_account_id: In the 'Parse & Classify' code node, replace 'YOUR-BUSINESS-ACCOUNT-UUID-HERE' with your actual business_account_id UUID from the business_accounts table.
_setup_notes.step_4_franchise_phones: In 'Parse & Classify', replace the FRANCHISE_PHONES array with the real phone numbers of your franchise owners (91-prefixed, no spaces or dashes).
_setup_notes.step_5_webhook: After activating, set up Evolution API webhook to POST to: http://<your-n8n-host>:5678/webhook/mercanta
_setup_notes.step_6_addstock_note: The 'addstock' command marks an item as is_available=true. To mark unavailable, you can manually use Supabase dashboard or extend the bot with a 'removestock <item>' command following the same pattern.
